meta.description: Classifies every supported Megaplan step/attempt transition, arnold.workflow module, pinned arnold.pipeline.native construct, and evidence_pack step with owner, support status, C2-C6 migration milestone, exception metadata, and visible non-conformant status where applicable.
meta.generated_by: C1 Contract Reality Reconciliation — M8 Step 24 (T31) — generate_wbc_boundary_inventory.py

migration_milestones.c2: C2: Schema-aware routing and typed step completion boundary.
migration_milestones.c3: C3: Semantic replay with durable state and evidence replay alignment.
migration_milestones.c4: C4: Authority attestation and human-in-the-loop override formalization.
migration_milestones.c5: C5: Full-suite compatibility replay with evidence-pack attestation.
migration_milestones.c6: C6: Production migration with real producer coverage for all declared contracts.

owners.maintenance: Maintenance — owns lifecycle, status, repair queues, incident ledger, watchdog, and cloud status.
owners.run_authority: Run Authority — owns authority facts, views, routing decisions, and execution verdicts.
owners.wbc: Workflow Boundary Contracts — owns declarations, schemas, evidence profiles, findings, and boundary matrices.

support_statuses.deprecated: No longer actively maintained; retained for backward compatibility only.
support_statuses.non_conformant: Visible non-conformance — known deviation from contract expectations.
support_statuses.partial: Partially supported — some code paths exist but coverage is incomplete or contains known gaps.
support_statuses.planned: Schema/contract declared but no producer emission path yet exists. Targeted for C2-C6 migration.
support_statuses.supported: Fully supported in the current codebase with real producer code paths.
